files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections for February Guide Lessons, each covering a different week and subject area: Theology, Work/Business, Literature (Carl Sandburg), and Social Service (Child Study). The file ends with some advertising content that appears to be part of the magazine layout.
